texto: I wonder if anyone will know what I mean when I say that some people make the world seem like a large place filled with different lands, languages and cultures and others make it seem like a small place where a new Tom Hanks movie is being released on video this week
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tales of Mere Existence: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I wonder if anyone will know what I mean when I say that some people make the world seem like a l…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, existence, mere pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mere e people.
